steps.title: Find the side length
steps.content:
A cube has $6$ square faces, each with area $s^2$. Use the surface area to solve for $s$:
$$
6s^2=150
$$
$$
s^2=25
$$
$$
s=5
$$

steps.title: Calculate the volume
steps.content: Use the cube volume formula with side length $5$: $$ V=5^3=125 $$ The answer is B.
